description: Create a runnable custom scout and its config in one atomic request.

body.description: Complete markdown prompt executed on every scout run. Include any project-specific signal names, thresholds, investigation steps, and report criteria here.

config.description: Optional schedule, enablement, dry-run posture, and delivery settings. Defaults to an enabled, emitting scout on the daily interval with no external destination.

emit.description: Whether the scout writes findings to the inbox. False = dry-run: it runs and logs but emits nothing. Defaults to true.

enabled.description: Whether this scout runs on its schedule. Defaults to true.

output_destinations.description: Destinations that receive each finding or report this scout emits. Empty by default.

channel.description: Slack channel target in the channel picker's `channel_id|#channel-name` format. Null while choosing a channel; no messages are sent until it is set.

integration_id.description: ID of the Slack integration whose bot posts this scout's findings and reports.

slack.description: Slack destination for each emitted scout finding or report. Null or omitted disables Slack delivery.

run_cron_schedule.description: Optional five-field cron expression, e.g. '30 9 * * *' (daily at 09:30), '0 9,17 * * *' (twice daily), or '0 9 * * 1-5' (weekday mornings). Evaluated in the project timezone. Takes precedence over `run_interval_minutes`; occurrences must be at least 30 minutes apart.

run_interval_minutes.description: Minutes between runs (30–43200). Defaults to 1440 (every 24 hours).

description.description: Short description of the signal or behavior this scout investigates.

files.description: Optional reference files bundled with the scout prompt.

content_type.description: MIME type of the file content.

path.description: File path relative to skill root, e.g. 'scripts/setup.sh' or 'references/guide.md'.

name.description: Unique scout name. Must start with `signals-scout-` and contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
